ddls:
CREATE TABLE "persons" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the person */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the person */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the person */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the person */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the person */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Current and past addresses of the person */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the person */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of dependents */,
  "military_service" TEXT /* Military service history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the case */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the person involved in the case */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of case (e.g., felony, misdemeanor) */,
  "charge_date" TEXT /* Date when the charge was filed */,
  "court_date" TEXT /* Date of the next court appearance */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the judge handling the case */,
  "attorney_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the attorney representing the individual */,
  "bail_amount" REAL /* Amount of bail set */,
  "bail_status" TEXT /* Status of bail (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the decision */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the person involved in the decision */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the case involved in the decision */,
  "decision_type" TEXT /* Type of decision (e.g., bail, sentencing) */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  "decision_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments related to the decision */,
  "decision_maker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the person who made the decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the person
Current and past addresses of the person

Unique identifier for the judge handling the case
